notes.f1: Recovered — Jan Gallo (b. 1893 Šútovo, Turany parish) is linked to father Andrej Gallo (I1) (and mother Katarina Križko). Matches the required finding (son of Andrej/Ondrej Gallo). Proof tier proved.
notes.f2: Recovered — Ondrej Gallo (I3, christening 1895 Turany) is linked as a child of Andrej Gallo + Katarina Križko, i.e. Jan's younger brother christened in the same Turany parish after 1893. Bonus finding satisfied.
